{{Quote|My son, Prince Vork, must marry a princess. One of wealth, breeding, and wealth. Gorphs, bring in the canidates.|Queen Slugga|audio=Slugga-MySonMustMarryAPrincess.flac|<ref name="Princess Latara" />}}
'''Slugga''' was the [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] of the [[Gorph/Legends|Gorphs]]. She was looking for a wife for her son [[Vork (Gorph)|Vork]], and had decided that she wanted him to [[Marriage/Legends|marry]] a [[Prince/Legends|princess]]. When she saw [[Latara/Legends|Latara]], she decided that she was the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] that her son should marry.

{{Char-stub}}
